title: Weekly Review Compiler - Reviews
description: Weekly review records generated by the Weekly Review Compiler plugin. Lazy-created on first run of /weekly:review. Each row represents one weekly review with an executive summary, wins, blockers, carryover items, and summary statistics.

Week Ending.description: Week ending date in YYYY-MM-DD format — primary lookup key and page title.

Executive Summary.description: 2-3 sentence overview of the week covering accomplishments, blockers, and outlook.

Wins.description: Completed tasks grouped by project. Each project listed with its finished items.

Meetings Summary.description: Total meeting count and key outcomes from the week's meetings.

Blockers.description: Blocked tasks, overdue items, and stagnant tasks that need attention.

Carryover Items.description: Open tasks that did not complete this week and carry forward to next week.

Next Week Priorities.description: AI-ranked top 5 priorities for the upcoming week based on urgency and impact.

Tasks Completed.description: Total number of tasks completed during the week.

Meetings Held.description: Total number of meetings held during the week.

Email Threads.description: Number of active email threads during the week.

Sources Used.description: Which data sources successfully contributed to this review.

Generated At.description: Timestamp when the weekly review was generated.

notes: The /weekly:review command searches for this database by name ('Weekly Review Compiler - Reviews') before creating it. Lazy-created on first run. One row per week — duplicate Week Ending entries are updated, not duplicated.
